rationale: Gov't Code §2306.176 governs department loan fees; it is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No overlap or conflict exists.
quote: The department may set, charge, and collect fees relating to loans made or other services provided by the department under this chapter.
_note: No conflict; the cited rule addresses TDHCA fee-setting authority, not property tax exemptions.
